name: structured-subset
description: Tier 1 structured-kernel performance gate. Exercises Jacobi-like and generic stencil patterns to validate that structured kernel lowering does not regress and improves scaling for the targeted workloads.

steps.name: scaling-sweep
steps.description: Serial-to-parallel scaling sweep at 1 and 16 threads for structured kernel benchmarks. Measures absolute speedup and detects scaling regressions introduced by structured lowering changes.

steps.name: full-thread
steps.description: Full 16-thread run for structured kernel benchmarks. Primary gate measurement for performance comparison against the baseline.
